concepts: opening-range or session-window continuation when a specific session structurally dominates follow-through
inventory-reset continuation after flush-and-reclaim rather than static oversold bounce logic
post-expansion partial-profit runner structure that keeps a core position for trend persistence
management_styles: one-shot entry with partial take-profit and runner
scale-in on improved confirmation, then scale-out into expansion
partial-profit first target with runner managed by structure instead of fixed take-profit only

next_cycle_focus: Run the TAO 4h batch and only refine branches that prove real blind-window participation and post-cost edge. Abort any zero-trade branch immediately rather than decorating the grammar.
rationale: Cycle 353 is currently aligned to a TAO 4h explore lane in CHOP. I wrote three materially distinct, mechanism-first structures with explicit component roles, failure modes, and density sanity checks to avoid repeating decorative sparse zero-trade grammar.
